case_title: FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP A CALIFORNIA VS. CHENG KUO ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED JAN-31-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUO, CHENG AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1755 O'FARRELL STREET, #PHF2, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
